---
title: "Skills"
---

## Technical Skills

### Programming & Data Analysis
- **Python:** NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn  
- **SQL**
- Data Cleaning, Feature Engineering, Feature Scaling & Normalization

### Machine Learning
- **Supervised Learning:** Linear & Logistic Regression, Ridge/Lasso/ElasticNet, kNN, SVM  
- **Tree-based Models:** Decision Trees, Random Forest, XGBoost  
- **Unsupervised Learning:** K-Means, Hierarchical Clustering, GMM  
- **Dimensionality Reduction:** PCA

### Model Evaluation & Optimization
- Train/Validation/Test Design, Cross-Validation  
- Handling Class Imbalance (SMOTE, weighting)  
- Regularization and performance metrics

### Deep Learning
- **Frameworks:** TensorFlow/Keras, PyTorch, PyTorch Lightning  
- **Architectures:** CNNs (VGG, ResNet, DenseNet), Sequence Models (LSTM, GRU, ConvLSTM)  
- **Computer Vision:** Object Detection (YOLO)  
- Transfer Learning and Fine-tuning

### NLP & Transformers
- Text Representation: BoW, TF-IDF, Word2Vec  
- Transformer Models: BERT, RoBERTa, DistilBERT, ALBERT (GPT – conceptual)  
- Text Classification  
- **Libraries:** Hugging Face Transformers, NLTK

### Scientific, Satellite & Geospatial Data
- NetCDF, HDF5, xarray  
- GeoPandas, PyProj  
- WRF Simulations and spatio-temporal data analysis

### Tools & Frameworks
- Git & GitHub  
- Scikit-learn, TensorFlow/Keras, PyTorch  
- Hugging Face Transformers  
- Jupyter Notebooks

## Soft Skills
- Research Communication  
- Analytical Thinking & Problem Solving  
- Collaboration & Mentorship
